---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#15: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture VIII`` (March 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **15**  | 51 | 23/03/2026 | - Sprint#15: ApartmentPredictor  Full-Architecture VIII </br></br>  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins </br></br> - **Queries**: JPQL, Criteria API, native</br></br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) Component for Filter  | - [ApartmentPrediction: 25282b](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/commits/25282b89057b25037608128dd168cd74f65ea5b2/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: 9e8a550](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/9e8a5505271663b85de05abc49a2b8d4af3bab55){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [Spring Boot: JPA Queries](/springboot/boot-concepts-jpa-4.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [query-creation definition](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/repositories/query-methods-details.html#repositories.query-methods.query-creation){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [query-creation](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/jpa/query-methods.html#jpa.query-methods.query-creation){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [query method subject keywords](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/repositories/query-keywords-reference.html#appendix.query.method.subject){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Spring Expression Language (SpEL)](https://docs.spring.io/spring-framework/reference/7.0/core/expressions.html){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [Lab#02: Derived Queries](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/PRA/Lab%2302_Derived_Queries.md){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [dijkstras-java](https://codingtechroom.com/tutorial/java-implementing-dijkstras-algorithm-in-java){.external target='_blank'}|
|   | 52 | 24/03/2026 | - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v6** </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins </br> (7) `School`: geoposition field</br>   </br> - <s>Queries: JPQL, Criteria API, native</s></br></br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: **v6** </br> (2)  Component for Filter  </br> (3) Component *page* for `School`/br> map for `leafletjs`  </br> (5) **create-assign** `school`-`apartment`  </br> </br>  - `ApartmentPrediction-React` **API, Data & State Layers refactor**: </br> (1) define current state </br> (2) which options do we have? </br> (3) decision-making: *option c*  </br> (4) create a plan and implementation phases </br> (5) code and implement it  | - [ApartmentPrediction: 4c01d893](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/4c01d893ece7acb73147c1a40672f48855a54876){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: a012a86](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/a012a8615df31327a3dbaadb95806b55a1e36143){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [leafletjs](https://leafletjs.com/){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [leafletjs-react](https://react-leaflet.js.org/){.external target='_blank'}</br> </br>  - [dataModel-refactor: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [datamodel-refactor.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/datamodel-refactor.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br> - [data-layer-options.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/data-layer-options.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br> - [refactor-plan-implement.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-implement.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [React Best Practices by Vercel: skill](https://mcpservers.org/agent-skills/vercel/react-best-practices){.external target='_blank'} |
|   |    | | |
|   | 53 | 26/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins</br>  </br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2) Filter | - [ApartmentPrediction: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/xxxxx){.external target='_blank'} |
|   | 54 | 27/03/2026 |  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins</br>  </br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: v5 </br> (2) Filter | - [ApartmentPrediction: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: xxxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/xxxxx){.external target='_blank'} |
: Backlog Sprint#15 March 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
